name: task-management
description: Backend-neutral task-management workflow package for review-gated task intake and adapter dispatch preparation.

interface.longDescription: Provides a thin task-management plugin package with a single primary skill for backend-neutral task drafting, review preparation, and adapter dispatch boundaries. It does not register MCP servers, configure credentials, or implement GitHub adapters.
defaultPrompt: Use task-management to turn this note into a reviewed task draft.
Use task-management to prepare a task routing preview.
Use task-management to check task backend boundaries.
